description: Scope-guard canary: a legitimate source-code path (`src/app/api/route.ts`, the canonical Next.js App-Router location) carrying a hardcoded JWT must still fire jwt-detector both pre-impl AND post-impl. Verifies the v0.15.4 D-C-001 ignore-expansion does NOT over-reach and silence findings on real user-code. Critical scope-discipline guard — if this canary flips silent post-impl, the new globs are matching too broadly and the fix is rejected.
